topDenialReasons.reason_fil: Hindi accredited ang ospital sa PhilHealth
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: I-check ang accreditation ng ospital bago pumasok. Tanungin: 'Accredited ba kayo sa PhilHealth?'
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: Check hospital accreditation before admission. Ask: 'Are you PhilHealth-accredited?'
topDenialReasons.appealNote_fil: Kung hindi accredited ang ospital, walang PhilHealth coverage. Dapat maghanap ng accredited na ospital.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_en: If hospital is not accredited, there is no PhilHealth coverage. Must find an accredited hospital.

topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: I-check ang contribution history sa PhilHealth Member Portal bago mag-admit.
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: Check contribution history on the PhilHealth Member Portal before admission.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_fil: Maaaring mag-appeal kung may patunay na ang kontribusyon ay nabayaran pero hindi pa na-post.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_en: Can appeal if there is proof that contributions were paid but not yet posted.

topDenialReasons.reason_fil: Hindi naka-register ang dependent sa MDR
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: I-update ang MDR bago mag-admit. Tanungin ang ospital kung maaaring i-update sa site para sa emergency cases.
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: Update MDR before admission. Ask hospital if on-site MDR update is possible for emergency cases.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_fil: Sa ilang kaso, maaaring i-update ang MDR bago mag-discharge at patuloy na i-process ang claim.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_en: In some cases, MDR can be updated before discharge and claim processing continues.

topDenialReasons.reason_fil: Mali o hindi kumpleto ang mga dokumento
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: Tiyaking kumpleto ang CF1, CF2, MDR, OR, SOA, at discharge summary bago umalis sa ospital.
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: Ensure CF1, CF2, MDR, OR, SOA, and discharge summary are all complete before leaving the hospital.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_fil: I-file ang MR na may kumpleto na mga dokumento sa PhilHealth Regional Office.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_en: File an MR with complete documents at the PhilHealth Regional Office.

topDenialReasons.reason_fil: Nalampasan ang 60-araw na deadline ng reimbursement
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: Mag-file ng reimbursement sa loob ng 60 araw mula sa discharge. Huwag antayin ang huling araw.
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: File reimbursement within 60 days from discharge. Do not wait until the last day.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_fil: IMPORTANTE (2025): Ang PhilHealth ay nag-reprocess ng 1.1 milyong denied claims (2018-2024) dahil sa late filing. Kung na-deny ang inyong claim noon dahil dito, subukan na i-resubmit ngayon. May 6-buwang window ang ospital para i-resubmit.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_en: IMPORTANT (2025): PhilHealth is reprocessing 1.1 million denied claims (2018-2024) due to late filing. If your claim was previously denied for this reason, try resubmitting now. Hospitals have a 6-month window to resubmit.

topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: Isa lamang ang claim para sa parehong admission. Tiyaking hindi nag-file ang ospital at ang miyembro nang sabay.
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: Only one claim per admission. Ensure the hospital and member did not both file for the same admission.

topDenialReasons.reason_fil: Hindi covered ang kondisyon (walang case rate)
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: I-check ang coverage sa KoberKo bago mag-admit. Kung wala sa listahan, maaaring walang PhilHealth case rate.
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: Check coverage on KoberKo before admission. If not in the list, there may be no PhilHealth case rate.

topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_fil: I-check ang contribution history online. Kung may kulang, kontakin ang HR at humingi ng Certification of Employment at Contributions.
topDenialReasons.howToAvoid_en: Check contribution history online. If there are gaps, contact HR and request a Certification of Employment and Contributions.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_fil: Ang employer ang may pananagutan - hindi ikaw. Maaari kang mag-file ng reklamo laban sa employer sa PhilHealth.
topDenialReasons.appealNote_en: The employer is liable - not you. You can file a complaint against the employer with PhilHealth.

step1.deadline_fil: 60 araw mula sa petsa ng denial notice
step1.deadline_en: 60 days from date of denial notice
step1.where_fil: PhilHealth Regional Office (PRO) na nag-cover sa ospital
step1.where_en: PhilHealth Regional Office (PRO) that covers the hospital
docs_fil: Sulat ng MR na nakalagay ang dahilan ng paghahalangka
Lahat ng orihinal na claim documents
docs_en: MR letter stating grounds for reconsideration
step1.fee_fil: Libre para sa indirect contributors (indigent, senior, etc.). May bayad para sa iba.
step1.fee_en: Free for indirect contributors (indigent, senior, etc.). Fee required for others.

step2.title_fil: Hakbang 2: Appeal sa PARD (kung na-deny ang MR)
step2.title_en: Step 2: Appeal to PARD (if MR is denied)
step2.deadline_fil: 15 araw mula sa petsa ng denial ng MR
step2.deadline_en: 15 days from date of MR denial
step2.where_fil: Protests and Appeals Review Department (PARD) - PhilHealth Central Office
step2.where_en: Protests and Appeals Review Department (PARD) - PhilHealth Central Office
step2.note_fil: Isang MR lamang ang pinapayagan. Pagkatapos, ang PARD ang susunod na hakbang.
step2.note_en: Only one MR is allowed. After that, PARD is the next step.

step3.title_fil: Hakbang 3: Appeal sa PhilHealth Board (huling hakbang)
step3.title_en: Step 3: Appeal to PhilHealth Board (final step)
step3.deadline_fil: 15 araw mula sa desisyon ng PARD
step3.note_fil: Ito ang huling administrative remedy. Pagkatapos nito, judicial review na ang susunod.
step3.note_en: This is the final administrative remedy. After this, judicial review is the next option.

reprocessing2025.title_fil: 2025 Update: Muling Pino-proseso ang 1.1 Milyong Denied Claims
reprocessing2025.title_en: 2025 Update: 1.1 Million Denied Claims Being Reprocessed
reprocessing2025.description_fil: Ang PhilHealth ay nag-aanunsyo ng reprocessing ng mga claim na na-deny dahil sa late filing mula Enero 1, 2018 hanggang Disyembre 31, 2024. Ang mga ospital ay mayroong 6 na buwan para i-resubmit ang mga affected claims.
reprocessing2025.description_en: PhilHealth announced reprocessing of claims denied due to late filing from January 1, 2018 to December 31, 2024. Hospitals have 6 months to resubmit affected claims.
reprocessing2025.whoIsAffected_fil: Mga pasyenteng ang claim ay na-deny ng ospital dahil hindi na-file sa loob ng 60 araw.
reprocessing2025.whoIsAffected_en: Patients whose claims were denied because the hospital did not file within the 60-day window.
reprocessing2025.whatToDo_fil: Kontakin ang ospital kung saan kayo nag-admit at itanong kung maaaring i-resubmit ang inyong claim. Ang ospital ang nag-a-apply - hindi ang pasyente.
reprocessing2025.whatToDo_en: Contact the hospital where you were admitted and ask if your claim can be resubmitted. The hospital applies - not the patient.
